tagline: Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, read, annotate, and fully preserve what matters, all in one place.
description:
Linkwarden is an open-source self-hosted bookmark and web archive manager designed to help users collect, organize, and preserve important online content in one place. In addition to traditional bookmarking capabilities, it provides full webpage backup so valuable information remains safely accessible over time.

Built around long-term content preservation, Linkwarden can automatically capture webpage screenshots, PDFs, and full HTML files to help prevent link rot. It also includes reading mode, annotations, local AI-powered tagging, full-text search, and a multi-level classification system for smarter and more efficient information management. Its modular architecture supports self-hosting, browser extensions, and cross-device sync.

In practice, Linkwarden is suitable not only for personal knowledge management and content collection, but also for team collaboration and shared curation. With collections and permission controls, users can organize content together and manage it publicly or privately. It is a modern bookmarking tool that balances data ownership, security, and collaboration.

**Key Features:**

- Full webpage archiving (screenshots, PDFs, HTML) to prevent link rot
- AI-powered auto-tagging and full-text search
- Reading mode, text highlighting, and annotations
- Multi-level categories and tags for flexible organization
- Team collaboration and permission management

**Learn more:**

- [Linkwarden GitHub](https://github.com/linkwarden/linkwarden)
author: linkwarden

releaseNotes.en_US:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 adds support for serving preserved HTML archives from a separate public hostname to isolate untrusted content from the main app.
- It improves the tag selection experience.
- The release also includes stability fixes and bug fixes.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 adds support for serving preserved HTML archives from a separate public hostname to isolate untrusted content from the main app.
- It improves the tag selection experience.
- The release also includes stability fixes and bug fixes.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 aggiunge il supporto per servire archivi HTML conservati da a nome host pubblico separato per isolare il contenuto non attendibile dall'app principale the.
- Migliora l'esperienza di selezione dei tag.
- La versione include anche correzioni di stabilità e correzioni di bug.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 legger til støtte for visning av bevarte HTML-arkiver fra a separate offentlige vertsnavn for å isolere uklarert innhold fra the hovedapp.
- Det forbedrer merkeopplevelsen.
- Utgivelsen inkluderer også stabilitets- og feilrettinger.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 增加了从单独 public hostname 提供 preserved HTML archives 的支持，以将不可信内容与主应用隔离。
- 改进了 tag selection 体验。
- 此版本还包含稳定性修复和 bug 修复。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 は、不信頼コンテンツをメインアプリから隔離するため、preserved HTML archives を別の public hostname から提供するサポートを追加します。
- tag selection の体験が改善されました。
- このリリースには安定性修正と bug 修正も含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1은 신뢰할 수 없는 콘텐츠를 기본 앱에서 분리하기 위해 preserved HTML archives를 별도의 public hostname에서 제공하는 기능을 추가합니다.
- tag selection 경험이 개선되었습니다.
- 이 릴리스에는 안정성 수정과 bug 수정도 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 ajoute la prise en charge de preserved HTML archives depuis un public hostname separe afin d'isoler le contenu non fiable de l'application principale.
- L'experience tag selection a ete amelioree.
- Cette version inclut aussi des correctifs de stabilite et des corrections de bugs.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 ergaenzt Support, preserved HTML archives ueber einen separaten public hostname bereitzustellen, um nicht vertrauenswuerdige Inhalte von der Haupt-App zu isolieren.
- Die tag selection-Erfahrung wurde verbessert.
- Das Release enthaelt ausserdem Stabilitaets- und Fehlerkorrekturen.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 lägger till stöd för att servera bevarade HTML-arkiv från a separata offentliga värdnamn för att isolera opålitligt innehåll från the huvudapp.
- Det förbättrar taggvalsupplevelsen.
- Utgåvan innehåller även stabilitetsfixar och buggfixar.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το Linkwarden 2.14.1 προσθέτει υποστήριξη για την προβολή διατηρημένων αρχείων HTML από a ξεχωριστό δημόσιο όνομα κεντρικού υπολογιστή για την απομόνωση μη αξιόπιστου περιεχομένου από την κύρια εφαρμογή the.
- Βελτιώνει την εμπειρία επιλογής ετικετών.
- Η έκδοση περιλαμβάνει επίσης διορθώσεις σταθερότητας και διορθώσεις σφαλμάτων.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 dodaje podršku za posluživanje sačuvanih HTML arhiva iz a zasebnog javnog naziva hosta za izolaciju nepouzdanog sadržaja iz the glavne aplikacije.
- Poboljšava iskustvo odabira oznaka.
- Izdanje također uključuje popravke stabilnosti i greške.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 adiciona suporte para servir ficheiros HTML preservados de a nome de host público separado para isolar conteúdo não fidedigno da aplicação principal the.
- Melhora a experiência de seleção de etiquetas.
- A versão inclui também correções de estabilidade e correções de bugs.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1 добавляет поддержку обслуживания сохраненных архивов HTML с отдельного общедоступного имени хоста a для изоляции ненадежного контента от основного приложения the.
- Это улучшает процесс выбора тегов.
- Релиз также включает исправления стабильности и ошибки.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- Linkwarden 2.14.1, güvenilmeyen içeriği the ana uygulamasından izole etmek için a ayrı genel ana bilgisayar adından korunmuş HTML arşivlerinin sunulmasına yönelik destek ekler.
- Etiket seçme deneyimini geliştirir.
- Sürüm aynı zamanda kararlılık düzeltmeleri ve hata düzeltmeleri de içeriyor.
